query: Audit my app's listing and tell me the top fixes.
setup: ASOSCAN_API_KEY set + at least one app in the ASOScan account.
expected_behavior: Uses GET /apps/{id}/aso-score as the headline number (overall + pillars + recommendations) rather than inventing a score
Reads GET /apps/{id}/metadata for the current title/subtitle/keywords/description
Enforces the correct platform limits (Apple 30/30/100 chars; Google 30/80/4000) and Apple's no-repeat / no-plural / no-generic keyword rules
Knows the Apple long description is not indexed for search, and that Google's full description is
Gives concrete field-by-field fixes with exact replacement text and character counts
Invents no awards/#1 claims, respects limits, and recommends outcomes not a guaranteed rank
